title: Build a Repeatable Weekly Report in Datilio
summary: Weekly reports become fast when upload, saved rules, charts, and export follow the same script.

content.summary: Weekly reports become fast when upload, saved rules, charts, and export follow the same script.

body.text: Heroics every Friday burn out analysts. Repeatability scales. Upload new export. Apply named rules.

body.alt: Business planning with documents and laptop
body.caption: Business planning with documents and laptop. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload new export. Apply named rules. Refresh bar and line charts. Sanity-check totals. Export filtered CSV.
Optional Talk to Data executive summary draft—verified last.

items: Track row count week over week.
Archive export date with slide deck.

body.text: Note friction each week—one new column? update preview checklist.
Datilio exists to make weekly file reports boringly reliable.

meta_description: Weekly reports become fast when upload, saved rules, charts, and export follow the same script.
